name: Pot Roast with Sour Cream Sauce-German Style
recipeIngredient: 4 pounds Top round or bottom round of beef
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook: Sprinkle 1 teaspoon salt in a large skillet. Heat over medium-high heat and brown the roast well on all sides.
2. Remove the roast to a slow cooker. Add the onion to the skillet and brown lightly, stirring often.
3. Pour in the wine, scraping up pan juices. Turn into the slow cooker with the remaining salt and pepper. Cover and cook 10-12 hours on low.
4. Before Serving: Skim off any fat from the liquid in the cooker. Heat in a medium skillet over low heat.
5. Stir in the flour to make a smooth paste. Then add the cooking liquid all at once; stir continuously until the sauce is smooth and has thickened, about 5-7 minutes.
6. Remove the skillet from heat. Stir in the sour cream. Serve the sauce over the pot roast.
